user_story: Como administrador, quero que a lista de usuários tenha a mesma largura das outras listagens do sistema, para ter uma experiência visual uniforme ao navegar entre páginas.
test_output_summary: Static source analysis via Node.js confirms: (1) section[data-testid='admin-users-page'] in apps/frontend/src/app/(authenticated)/admin/usuarios/page.tsx carries the class string 'mx-auto flex w-full max-w-3xl flex-col gap-8 px-4 py-10 sm:px-6'; (2) apps/frontend/src/app/(authenticated)/check-ins/page.tsx carries the identical class string. All 4 assertions PASS. Vitest acceptance test file created but could not be executed via pnpm runner because vitest.config.ts restricts include to 'src/**' — static verification is conclusive in lieu of runner output.
notes: Both pages use the identical Tailwind layout token: 'mx-auto flex w-full max-w-3xl flex-col gap-8 px-4 py-10 sm:px-6'. No pre-existing unit test covered this layout concern. Acceptance test created at evidence path; vitest include config limits test runner to src/ — test runs cleanly when executed directly with npx vitest from the apps/frontend root with a custom include glob, but pnpm --filter frontend test cannot pick it up without config change. Static node verification used as authoritative evidence.
